title: Enter the garden.
summary: Four public, low-pressure ways to meet Greenpill: subscribe to field notes, join the public conversation, self-assess your fit, then book a steward call when a human conversation is the right next step.

steps.title: Subscribe to field notes
steps.body: A monthly public digest with chapter updates, new resources, podcast highlights, and upcoming calls.

steps.title: Join the public conversation
steps.body: Drop into the shared Greenpill chat and listen before you contribute. The public site should route newcomers without forcing an immediate commitment.

steps.title: Take the Regen Assessment
steps.body: Answer a short set of questions about what you bring, what you want to learn, and whether a chapter, guild, or story path is the best fit.
steps.meta: Planned public flow · no private answers in Keystatic

steps.title: Book a steward call
steps.body: For people thinking about starting a chapter, joining a guild, partnering on a project, or finding the right steward to talk with.

afterCards.title: Find an existing chapter
afterCards.body: Browse public chapter records, start with the strongest source-backed locations, and use steward review flags for chapters that need more proof before launch.

afterCards.title: Find a contribution path
afterCards.body: Start with the Dev Guild, Writers Guild, or the Green Goods public docs when your next step is building, writing, or impact verification.

afterCards.title: Read the public commons
afterCards.body: Use the Library to browse books, podcast episodes, Hub threads, Garden material, and Dev Guild writing.

emailPreview.title: Chapter updates, builder notes, and new resources
emailPreview.body: The preview should use illustrative copy only until the newsletter source is wired.

telegramPreview.title: Listen first, contribute when ready
telegramPreview.body: Do not render private Telegram or Discord messages. Use approved public copy for the preview.

assessmentPreview.title: Map your next contribution
assessmentPreview.body: The public page can preview assessment topics; real answers belong in the future private/workspace flow.
assessmentPreview.meta: No private answers in public content

stewardCallPreview.title: Talk to a real person
stewardCallPreview.body: Use this for high-intent visitors. Availability, RSVPs, and contact details stay outside public Keystatic content.

media.imageAlt: Garden texture from the high-fidelity design package

seo.title: Enter the Garden · Greenpill Network
seo.description: The Greenpill Garden is a public onboarding ramp for newcomers, chapter stewards, builders, writers, and partners.
